item.title: NLC India Ltd. Hits All-Time High of Rs 330.50 as Momentum Builds Across Timeframes
item.description: Extending its recent rally, NLC India Ltd. touched a fresh all-time high of Rs 330.50 on 07 May 2026, marking a significant milestone for the small-cap power company. This surge comes amid broad-based strength across multiple timeframes, with the stock outperforming both its sector and the broader Sensex index. Time: 4 minutes ago

item.title: 99.7% Return in One Year, 21.6% Profit Growth: What Drives Wheels India Ltd.'s Multibagger Rally?
item.description: A 99.7% stock return in one year. A 21.6% growth in net profit over the same period. The gap between those two numbers — roughly 78 percentage points — is driven largely by the market's willingness to pay more for each rupee of Wheels India Ltd.'s earnings. That premium expansion is the defining feature of this multibagger rally. Time: 6 minutes ago

item.title: Piramal Pharma Ltd Surges 8.42% to Day's High of Rs 175.7 — Outperforms Sector by 6.05 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined 0.18% on 7 May 2026, while Piramal Pharma Ltd surged 8.42%, outperforming its Pharmaceuticals & Biotechnology sector by 6.05 percentage points. This sharp single-session gain stands out as a stock-specific event amid a broadly weak market backdrop. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: Linde India Ltd. Surges 5.3% to Day's High of Rs 7995.95 — Outperforms Sector by 3.95 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex slipped 0.18% on 7 May 2026, while Linde India Ltd. surged 5.3%, touching an intraday high of Rs 7995.95. That 3.95-percentage-point outperformance over its sector signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a market-wide lift. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: Ashiana Housing Ltd. Surges 9.39% to Day's High of Rs 363 — Outperforms Realty Sector by 5.56 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined by 0.18% on 7 May 2026, while Ashiana Housing Ltd. surged 9.39% to touch an intraday high of Rs 363, outperforming its Realty sector peers by 5.56 percentage points. This sharp single-session gain stands out as a stock-specific event amid a broadly weak market environment. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Neogen Chemicals Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 1807.8
item.description: With a decisive surge to Rs 1807.8 on 7 May 2026, Neogen Chemicals Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week high, propelled by a confluence of bullish technical indicators and sustained price momentum that outpaces its sector peers. Time: 15 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts MIRC Electronics Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 39.24
item.description: Surging past its previous peaks, MIRC Electronics Ltd touched a fresh 52-week high of Rs 39.24 on 7 May 2026, marking a remarkable rally from its 52-week low of Rs 12.99. This milestone reflects a sustained momentum driven by a confluence of bullish technical indicators and robust price action. Time: 15 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Finolex Cables Ltd. to 52-Week High of Rs 1101
item.description: Finolex Cables Ltd. surged to a fresh 52-week high of Rs 1101 on 7 May 2026, marking a significant milestone in its price momentum. This advance comes amid a backdrop of strong technical signals and sustained outperformance relative to its sector and the broader market. Time: 16 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Vibrant Global Capital Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 56.4
item.description: From a 52-week low of Rs 28.1 to a fresh high of Rs 56.4 on 7 May 2026, Vibrant Global Capital Ltd has delivered a remarkable 32.86% return over the past year, significantly outperforming the Sensex which declined by 3.62% in the same period. This milestone reflects a sustained rally fuelled by a confluence of positive technical indicators and price momentum despite a volatile broader market backdrop. Time: 16 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Kirloskar Pneumatic Company Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 1600
item.description: Surging past its previous peaks, Kirloskar Pneumatic Company Ltd touched a fresh 52-week high of Rs 1600 on 07 Jun 2026, marking a significant milestone in its price momentum. This advance comes amid a backdrop of strong technical signals and sustained upward momentum, setting the stage for a compelling technical narrative. Time: 16 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Kanishk Steel Industries Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 66.38
item.description: Surging past its previous peaks, Kanishk Steel Industries Ltd touched a fresh 52-week high of Rs 66.38 on 07 May 2026, marking an impressive 85.09% gain over the past year and significantly outperforming the Sensex, which declined by 3.62% during the same period. Time: 16 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Riddhi Siddhi Gluco Biols Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 747.95
item.description: Surging to an intraday peak of Rs 747.95 on 7 May 2026, Riddhi Siddhi Gluco Biols Ltd has marked a significant milestone by reaching a fresh 52-week high. This achievement caps a four-day winning streak that has propelled the stock up by 17.81%, outpacing its sector by 3.63% on the day of the breakout. Time: 16 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Linde India Ltd. to 52-Week High of Rs 7960
item.description: With a decisive surge to Rs 7,960 on 7 May 2026, Linde India Ltd. has marked a new 52-week high, propelled by a confluence of robust technical indicators and sustained price momentum that has captivated market attention. Time: 16 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Kernex Microsystems (India) Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 1474.45
item.description: Surging past its previous peaks, Kernex Microsystems (India) Ltd touched a new 52-week high of Rs 1474.45 on 07 Jun 2026, marking a remarkable rally that has more than doubled the stock price from its 52-week low of Rs 672.05. This milestone underscores the powerful momentum driving the stock, supported by a confluence of technical indicators signalling sustained strength. Time: 16 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Natco Pharma Ltd. to 52-Week High of Rs 1174.75
item.description: With a sustained five-day rally culminating in a fresh 52-week high of Rs 1174.75 on 7 May 2026, Natco Pharma Ltd. has demonstrated remarkable price momentum, outpacing its sector and the broader market over the past year. Time: 16 minutes ago

item.title: Kernex Microsystems Rallies 7.47% to Day High of Rs 1474.45 — Outperforms Sector by 7.82 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex edged lower by 0.05% on 07 May 2026, while Kernex Microsystems (India) Ltd surged 7.47%, touching an intraday high of Rs 1474.45. This 7.82 percentage-point outperformance over its Transport Services sector peers highlights a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a broad market lift. Time: 25 minutes ago

item.title: V I P Industries Ltd Surges 7.95% to Day's High of Rs 328.5 — Outperforms Sector by 6.2 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex edged lower by 0.05% on 7 May 2026, while V I P Industries Ltd surged 7.95%, touching an intraday high of Rs 328.5. This 6.2 percentage-point outperformance over its sector highlights a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a broad market lift. Time: 25 minutes ago

item.title: TechNVision Ventures Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: TechNVision Ventures Ltd experienced a significant intraday decline on 7 May 2026, touching a low of Rs 5,315.05, down 9.56% from the previous close. The stock underperformed its sector and broader market indices amid heightened volatility and downward pressure. Time: 25 minutes ago

item.title: Allied Blenders & Distillers Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 5% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 572, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. Allied Blenders & Distillers Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 4.99% on 7 May 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 26 minutes ago

item.title: Jainam Ferro Alloys Locks at Upper Circuit With 3.72% Gain Amid Rising Delivery Volumes
item.description: At Rs 282.3, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. Jainam Ferro Alloys (I) Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 5% on 07 May 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 26 minutes ago
